summary: A Go-based pluggable test runner and detector framework with Kubernetes integration, currently in a planning/documentation phase.
concerns: key hot files are test files, suggesting core logic may lack documentation or implementation files are thin
recent commits are entirely docs/chore with no code changes, indicating possible development stall
heavy reliance on config directories (.claude, .gorchestra, GOrchestra/intel) adds cognitive overhead
suggestions: focus on implementing core logic in assertion.go and runner.go rather than planning
reduce config file sprawl by consolidating .gorchestra and GOrchestra directories
add integration tests for the Kubernetes examples
establish a v0.4.0 milestone to convert recent session notes into actionable code tasks
